title: Check-In and Check-Out Procedures FAQ for Hotels in Egypt
question: What are the standard check-in and check-out times at hotels in Egypt?
answer: The standard check-in time at most hotels in Egypt is typically around 3:00 PM, while the check-out time is usually by 12:00 PM. However, these times can vary depending on the hotel's policy. Guests are encouraged to confirm the specific times with their hotel prior to arrival. Early check-in and late check-out may be available upon request, subject to room availability and may incur additional charges.
